message:
✨ Add other-projects.mjs manifest with 35 popular open source projects (#305)

Adds a new `scripts/other-projects.mjs` catalog alongside the existing
`k8s-platforms.mjs`. The platform install generator now reads both lists,
so these projects get auto-generated install missions on the same 4x daily
cadence.

Projects span AI/ML (Kagenti, llm-d, vLLM, Ollama, KubeRay, Kubeflow),
databases (ClickHouse, Milvus, Qdrant, Weaviate, Valkey, Dragonfly),
networking (Kong, Traefik, APISIX, Consul), observability (SigNoz,
Netdata), security (Keycloak, Vault, Tetragon), CI/CD (Gitea,
Woodpecker, Drone), storage (MinIO, SeaweedFS), workflow (n8n, Temporal),
dev platforms (Backstage, Harbor), and more.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -20,6 +20,7 @@ import { writeFileSync, mkdirSync, existsSync, readFileSync, readdirSync } from
 import { join, dirname } from 'path'
 import { fileURLToPath } from 'url'
 import { K8S_PLATFORMS, getPlatformByName } from './k8s-platforms.mjs'
+import { OTHER_PROJECTS } from './other-projects.mjs'
 import { validateMissionExport, scanForSensitiveData, scanForMaliciousContent } from './scanner.mjs'
 import { scoreMission } from './quality-scorer.mjs'
 
@@ -644,13 +645,14 @@ function formatReport(results) {
 // ─── Main ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 async function main() {
   console.log('=== Platform Install Mission Generator ===')
-  console.log(`Platforms in catalog: ${K8S_PLATFORMS.length}`)
+  const ALL_PROJECTS = [...K8S_PLATFORMS, ...OTHER_PROJECTS]
+  console.log(`Projects in catalog: ${ALL_PROJECTS.length} (${K8S_PLATFORMS.length} platforms + ${OTHER_PROJECTS.length} other)`)
 
   // Determine which platforms to process
-  let platforms = [...K8S_PLATFORMS]
+  let platforms = [...ALL_PROJECTS]
   if (TARGET_PLATFORMS && TARGET_PLATFORMS.length > 0) {
     platforms = TARGET_PLATFORMS
-      .map(name => getPlatformByName(name))
+      .map(name => getPlatformByName(name) || OTHER_PROJECTS.find(p => p.name === name))
       .filter(Boolean)
     console.log(`Targeting ${platforms.length} platform(s): ${platforms.map(p => p.name).join(', ')}`)
   }

@@ -0,0 +1,514 @@
+/**
+ * Other Open Source Projects Catalog
+ *
+ * Popular non-CNCF projects that users commonly deploy on Kubernetes.
+ * Uses the same schema as k8s-platforms.mjs so the platform install
+ * generator can process both lists identically.
+ *
+ * Fields:
+ *   name        — unique kebab-case identifier (used in file names)
+ *   displayName — human-readable name
+ *   repo        — GitHub owner/repo for knowledge crawling
+ *   type        — project type for UI filtering
+ *   category    — logical grouping
+ *   provider    — maintainer / org name
+ *   docs        — primary docs URL
+ *   versions    — recent version strings the LLM should cover
+ *   k8sVersions — Kubernetes API versions supported
+ */
+

+  return OTHER_PROJECTS.find(p => p.name === name) || null
+}
